user.title: Health Auto Import — scanning network…
user.description: Scanning your local network for Health Auto Export servers on port 9000.

pick.title: Health Auto Import — server found
pick.description: Select a discovered Health Auto Export server, or enter an address manually.

manual.title: Health Auto Import — manual connection
manual.description: Enter the IP address and port shown on the Server screen of the Health Auto Export app on your iPhone or iPad.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the HAE server. Make sure HAE is foregrounded on the device and the server is started.
error.invalid_host: Invalid host name. Use an IP address or hostname (letters, digits, dots, hyphens only).

abort.already_configured: This Health Auto Export server is already imported.
